[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001000 2
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000100011 3

12 21 0001010000 2
23 32 0011000000 2
34 43 0110000000 2
45 54 0100000000 1
56 65 0101000000 2
67 76 0001100000 2
70 07 0000101000 2

13 31 1001000000 2
